title: Observe agent behavior and feed blockers back into corridor
goal: Give an agent the READY_FOR_AGENT task, observe where it succeeds or blocks, improve corridor based on evidence.
scope: Execute bounded agent task with stage map
non_goals: Do not auto-fix corridor issues without Owner review
Do not mark READY_FOR_AGENT true for subsequent tasks
Do not bypass observation with assumptions
owner_intent: Use real agent execution evidence to improve the corridor for future organ builds.
risks: Observation may be too shallow to identify real blockers
Corridor improvements may introduce new issues
open_questions: How to measure agent compliance with stage map?
What constitutes a meaningful blocker vs noise?
Should observation produce a formal audit report?
no_fake_green_note: Observation task cannot be marked complete without evidence of actual agent execution and blocker documentation.
